name: Hoax.ai First Internal Draft Blueprint Pack
governing_principle: A draft blueprint may authorize structure. It must not become prose.

blueprints.reference_thesis: Governed artifact-level posture vocabulary anchor for taxonomy, standard, and protocol.
blueprints.reference_purpose: Structure future draft for evidence posture as foundational reference concept.
blueprints.definition_scope: Taxonomy posture vocabulary and bounded governance use. Excludes detector, upload, scoring, verdict framing.
blueprints.governance_boundary: Not truth certification, subject accusation, public tool, or operational detector output.
blueprints.claim_scope: Repository-supported governance and taxonomy claims only.
blueprints.semantic_seo_role: Internal plan: clarify governed meaning of evidence posture. No public title, meta, canonical, or schema.
blueprints.structured_data_boundary: Article or DefinedTerm planning only; no public schema deployment.
blueprints.interface_boundary: No tool UI, upload surface, or classifier interface implication.
blueprints.security_privacy_boundary: Internal governance record; no public data collection or user interaction.
blueprints.non_authorization_statement: This blueprint record does not authorize drafts, draft files, routes, sitemap, publication, deployment, SEO expansion, or public metadata.
blueprints.notes: Foundational blueprint. Structure only. No prose.

blueprints.reference_thesis: Governed separation between artifact examination and subject accusation.
blueprints.reference_purpose: Structure future draft for artifact–subject separation boundary.
blueprints.definition_scope: Artifact vs subject boundary in posture language. Excludes guilt, fraud verdict, institutional blame.
blueprints.governance_boundary: Not accusation resource, fraud determination page, or subject scoring surface.
blueprints.claim_scope: Governance boundary claims from decision log and boundary documents only.
blueprints.semantic_seo_role: Internal plan: clarify boundary meaning. No public metadata fields.
blueprints.structured_data_boundary: No public schema; boundary page metadata planning only.
blueprints.interface_boundary: No accusation-oriented UI or detector interface implication.
blueprints.security_privacy_boundary: Internal record; no subject data handling implied.
blueprints.non_authorization_statement: This blueprint record does not authorize drafts, draft files, routes, sitemap, publication, deployment, SEO expansion, or public metadata.

blueprints.reference_thesis: Governed language contract for future engine output without public tool implication.
blueprints.reference_purpose: Structure future draft linking output boundary schema to engine model boundaries.
blueprints.definition_scope: Schema fields and prohibited output classes. Excludes API docs, product pages, classifier marketing.
blueprints.governance_boundary: Not software product, API availability, or live classifier output page.
blueprints.claim_scope: Schema and governance file claims only.
blueprints.semantic_seo_role: Internal plan: clarify output boundary meaning. No public slug or canonical.
blueprints.structured_data_boundary: TechArticle planning only; no SoftwareApplication schema.
blueprints.interface_boundary: No public tool or API interface embodiment.
blueprints.security_privacy_boundary: Internal schema planning; no operational data flow.
blueprints.non_authorization_statement: This blueprint record does not authorize drafts, draft files, routes, sitemap, publication, deployment, SEO expansion, or public metadata.

blueprints.reference_thesis: Governed claim-to-source mapping requirement before public release.
blueprints.reference_purpose: Structure future draft for claim and source traceability governance unit.
blueprints.definition_scope: Claim policy, evidence ledger, claim-source map, source registry discipline. Excludes unmapped external claims.
blueprints.governance_boundary: Not source verification service, forensic certification, or external truth authority.
blueprints.claim_scope: Traceability governance claims only; no external factual statistics.
blueprints.semantic_seo_role: Internal plan: clarify traceability governance meaning. No public metadata.
blueprints.structured_data_boundary: No public schema; governance reference planning only.
blueprints.interface_boundary: No upload, scoring, or classifier interface.
blueprints.security_privacy_boundary: Internal traceability planning; no public data ingestion.
blueprints.non_authorization_statement: This blueprint record does not authorize drafts, draft files, routes, sitemap, publication, deployment, SEO expansion, or public metadata.
